tables.name: experiment_x_measurement
tables.schema_sql: experiment_id STRING, variable_id STRING, measurement_set_id STRING, quality STRING, timestamp STRING

tables.name: experimental_context
tables.schema_sql: experiment_context_id STRING, experiment_id STRING, variable_id STRING, value STRING

tables.name: experimental_variable
tables.schema_sql: variable_id STRING, name STRING, name_cv_id STRING, description STRING, value_type STRING, units STRING

tables.name: measurement
tables.schema_sql: measurement_id STRING, measurement_set_id STRING, condition_set_id STRING, value DOUBLE

tables.name: protocol
tables.schema_sql: protocol_id STRING, name STRING, description STRING, steps STRING

tables.name: experiment_parsed
tables.schema_sql: experiment_id STRING, name STRING, description STRING, protocol_id STRING, created_at DATE, contributor STRING
